overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character riding a horse through a snowy mountain pass during a blizzard at night. The scene features heavy snowfall with low visibility, a frozen creek running alongside the trail, and dense snow-covered pine forests in a remote wilderness setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail alongside frozen creek

agents.ego_description: steadily riding a horse along a narrow snowy trail beside a frozen creek during heavy snowfall

entered.detail: narrow frozen waterway running parallel to the trail on the left side
snow-covered rocky outcrop rising above the creek on the left
dense cluster of pine trees heavily laden with snow
snow-packed path winding through the mountain terrain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow mountain trail blanketed in deep snow, with a frozen creek running parallel on the left. Dense snow-covered pines line both sides of the path, creating an enclosed feeling. The horse and rider move steadily forward through the blizzard conditions with very low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field with scattered pine trees

events.description: trail curves away from the frozen creek into a more open snow-covered field

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride through open snow-covered terrain as the creek falls behind and trees become more scattered

entered.detail: gentle slope rising on the right side covered in deep snow
dark line of trees visible through the snowfall in the distance

segments.scene_description: The terrain opens up as the trail moves away from the creek into a wider snow field. The dense forest gives way to scattered pines, and a snow-covered hillside rises on the right. Visibility remains poor due to the continuing blizzard as the rider progresses toward a distant tree line.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide mountain valley approach with distant peaks

events.description: distant mountain range becomes visible ahead through the snowfall

agents.ego_description: riding toward a distant mountain pass or valley opening with terrain widening significantly

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the distance ahead
wide passage between mountain slopes leading into the distance

segments.scene_description: The landscape opens into a wide mountain valley with distant peaks visible through the blizzard. The trail continues through deep snow toward a mountain pass ahead. Sparse trees dot the landscape as the terrain gradually descends into the valley floor, with snow-covered slopes rising on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic mountain trail that gradually expands into a vast, open valley. It begins on a narrow path blanketed in deep snow, moving steadily forward beside a frozen creek and enclosed by dense, snow-covered pines under the haze of a blizzard. As the rider progresses, the terrain opens away from the creek into a wider snow field where the thick forest gives way to scattered pines and a rising hillside. The scene then expands further into a wide mountain valley, revealing distant peaks through the swirling snow as the trail descends toward a mountain pass. Finally, the landscape opens completely, with sparse trees dotting the valley floor and snow-covered slopes rising on both sides.
